description_long: This object is a small, human-like infant figure with a realistic body shape, including a rounded head, short limbs, and a slightly protruding belly. The skin tone is a pale, flesh-like color, and the surface appears to have some subtle texture, possibly simulating skin details. The figure is unclothed, with no visible garments or accessories, and the hands and feet are simply modeled. The facial features are faint but discernible, with a small nose, closed mouth, and shallow eye sockets. The object is solid and compact, with no visible openings or separable parts. Its overall appearance suggests it is a model or doll intended to represent a human infant.
description: A small, realistic infant figure with a pale, flesh-like color and subtle surface texture, unclothed and simply modeled.
description_view_0: The infant is seen from above, showing the rounded belly, spread arms, and bent legs, with the head facing upward.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the profile of the head, the curvature of the back, and the relaxed position of the limbs.
description_view_2: The back of the infant is visible, displaying the smooth contour of the body and the spread of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, showing the facial profile and the alignment of the limbs along the ground.
